name: INACTIVE_CUSTOMERS_90_DAYS
description: Identify customers with no transactions in the last 90 days for customer care campaign

steps.name: LOAD_CUSTOMERS
steps.sql:
SELECT
    customer_id,
    full_name,
    email,
    phone,
    segment,
    status
FROM ${CUSTOMERS_TABLE}
WHERE customer_id IS NOT NULL
steps.description: Load all customers with key fields from source table

steps.name: LOAD_RECENT_TRANSACTIONS
steps.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
    customer_id
FROM ${TRANSACTIONS_TABLE}
WHERE txn_date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE, 90)
  AND customer_id IS NOT NULL
steps.description: Load distinct customer IDs from transactions in the last 90 days

steps.name: FILTER_NO_RECENT_TXNS
steps.sql:
SELECT
    c.customer_id,
    c.full_name,
    c.email,
    c.phone,
    c.segment,
    c.status
FROM LOAD_CUSTOMERS c
LEFT ANTI JOIN LOAD_RECENT_TRANSACTIONS r
    ON c.customer_id = r.customer_id
steps.description: Select customers with no recent transactions via anti-join

steps.name: SAVE_RESULT
steps.sql:
SELECT
    customer_id,
    full_name,
    email,
    phone,
    segment,
    status
FROM FILTER_NO_RECENT_TXNS
steps.description: Persist the final list of inactive customers to output table
